message:
fix: parse bd show --json as array consistently (gt-4jahjt)

getCleanupStatus in witness/handlers.go and runSwarmCancel in cmd/swarm.go
were parsing bd show --json output as a single struct, but bd show --json
always returns an array. This caused json.Unmarshal to silently fail,
returning empty data. Fixed both to parse as []struct{} consistent with
all other call sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
